mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lucky_letters (room_id, sender_id, receiver_id, content, emoji, sent_at) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, #{emoji}, #{sentAt})

INSERT INTO lucky_letters (room_id, sender_id, receiver_id, content, emoji, sent_at) VALUES
(#{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, #{emoji}, #{sentAt})
mapper.select: SELECT l.id, l.sender_id, sender.nickname AS sender_nickname, sender.profile_image_url AS sender_profile_image_url, l.receiver_id, receiver.nickname AS receiver_nickname, receiver.profile_image_url AS receiver_profile_image_url, l.content, l.emoji, l.read_at, l.sent_at, EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM letter_favorites f WHERE f.letter_id = l.id AND f.user_id = #{viewerId} ) AS is_favorite FROM lucky_letters l JOIN users sender ON sender.id = l.sender_id JOIN users receiver ON receiver.id = l.receiver_id WHERE l.id = #{id}
